prompt: Draw a one-bedroom studio apartment of about 42 m². It should have a living/kitchen area, a separate bedroom, and a bathroom off a small hall. Put a window in the bedroom and a front door.

adjacency.source: brief: 'a bathroom off a small hall'

prompt: Lay out a two-bedroom flat organised around a central hall so no room is reached through another. Include a kitchen/living area, a master bedroom, a second bedroom, a bathroom off the hall, and a small study. Give both bedrooms a window.

adjacency.source: brief: 'organised around a central hall so no room is reached through another'

prompt: Design a one-bedroom flat using relative placement: anchor the living room, then put the kitchen to its right, the bedroom below it, and the bathroom next to the bedroom. The bathroom should open off the kitchen, not through the bedroom.

adjacency.source: brief: 'The bathroom should open off the kitchen, not through the bedroom'

prompt: A compact cottage: one living/kitchen room, a bedroom, and a bathroom, both opening off the living space. Dimension the drawing automatically instead of placing dimension lines by hand.

adjacency.source: brief: 'a bedroom, and a bathroom, both opening off the living space'

prompt: A one-bedroom flat — a living/kitchen area, a bedroom, and a bathroom — where the bathroom fixtures — WC, basin, and shower — are set against the walls rather than floating. Add a bed rotated to lie along the bedroom wall.
Design a small open-plan office (~100 m²): one large open work area, a meeting room, and a kitchenette. Give each room a door and put windows on the outside walls.

Lay out a core-and-shell office floor for tenant fit-out: two demised suites, a tea-point zone, and a circulation core, all walled with doors and windows. Do not install any fixtures — the fit-out is the tenant's responsibility.
A two-bedroom flat with a kitchen/living area and two bathrooms, both bathrooms opening off the central hall so neither is reached through a bedroom. Both bedrooms should have a window.

adjacency.source: brief: 'two bathrooms, both opening off the central hall so neither is reached through a bedroom'

prompt: An open-plan loft where the kitchen, dining, and living zones flow into one another through wide cased openings with no doors between them; only the bathroom is a fully enclosed room with a real door.

adjacency.source: brief: 'the kitchen, dining, and living zones flow into one another through wide cased openings'

prompt: Generate a terrace of four identical studio units in a row, each its own room with a street door and a window. Use parameters so changing the unit count regenerates the whole terrace.

A three-bedroom, two-bathroom family apartment on a central hall. Every bedroom and both bathrooms open off the hall, all three bedrooms get a window, and there is a kitchen/living area and a utility room.

adjacency.source: brief: 'Every bedroom and both bathrooms open off the hall'

prompt: A one-bedroom flat with a galley kitchen: line the sink, counter, stove, and fridge along one wall. Add a living/dining room, a bedroom with a window, and a bathroom.
A one-bedroom flat on an L-shaped footprint (not a plain rectangle). The living room wraps the inner corner, with the kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom each opening off it.

adjacency.source: brief: 'the kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom each opening off it'

prompt: A wheelchair-accessible one-bedroom flat: 1000 mm-plus doorways, generous rooms off a wide hall, and clear circulation throughout. It must satisfy accessibility guidance.

adjacency.source: brief: 'generous rooms off a wide hall'

prompt: A wheelchair-accessible one-bedroom flat — a living/kitchen area, a bedroom, and a generous wet room — with wide 1000 mm doorways, a large clear turning space, and plumbing fixtures set against the walls. It must satisfy accessibility guidance.
A compact studio flat: one main room with the bed as furniture (so it reads as a living space, not a walk-through bedroom), a kitchenette linked by a cased opening, and a separate bathroom.

adjacency.source: brief: 'a kitchenette linked by a cased opening'

prompt: A two-bedroom bungalow with a living room and kitchen on one side and two bedrooms plus the bathroom off a central hall. Label every room's dimensions automatically in the margin.

adjacency.source: brief: 'two bedrooms plus the bathroom off a central hall'

prompt: A small commercial office suite: a reception area, two private offices, a meeting room, a kitchenette, and a WC. Everything should be reachable from the reception entrance.

A row of three identical consulting rooms opening off a single shared corridor that runs the full width in front of them. Lay the three rooms out end to end, give each its own door onto the corridor and a window, and put the entrance at the corridor.

adjacency.source: brief: 'three consulting rooms opening off a single shared corridor'

prompt: A one-bedroom flat — a living/kitchen area, a bedroom, and a bathroom off the living space — where every door and window is positioned by how far along its wall it sits rather than by an absolute point. The bath must open off the living area (not through the bedroom) and the bedroom needs a window.

adjacency.source: brief: 'The bath must open off the living area (not through the bedroom)'

prompt: A one-bedroom flat where the furniture is arranged by which corner or edge of its room each piece sits against, not by coordinates: a sofa centred in the living room, a table set in from one corner, the bed backed into a bedroom corner, and the bathroom fixtures tucked into the room's corners.

A two-bedroom flat laid out as a run of rooms across the top with a hall and bathroom below. Every room must be reachable by a door off the hall, both bedrooms need a window, and the bathroom must open off the hall rather than through a bedroom. It should pass a strict validation with no warnings.

adjacency.source: brief: 'Every room must be reachable by a door off the hall ... the bathroom must open off the hall rather than through a bedroom'

prompt: A one-bedroom flat with a kitchen of 12 m², a bedroom of at least 10 m², a living room, and a bathroom. The bedroom and bathroom open off the living room; give the bedroom a window and add a front door.

adjacency.source: brief: 'The bedroom and bathroom open off the living room'

prompt: A two-bedroom flat where each bedroom is at least 11 m², plus a kitchen/living area and a bathroom. Both bedrooms open off the living space and each gets a window.

areaM2.source: brief: 'each bedroom is at least 11 m²'

adjacency.source: brief: 'Both bedrooms open off the living space'

prompt: A wheelchair-accessible one-bedroom flat with a wet room of at least 5 m²: a living/kitchen area, a bedroom, and the wet room, all with 1000 mm doorways off a wide hall.

areaM2.source: brief: 'wet room of at least 5 m²'

adjacency.source: brief: 'all with 1000 mm doorways off a wide hall'

prompt: A small office suite with a meeting room of about 20 m² and an open work area of at least 60 m², plus a kitchenette and a WC, every room reachable from the entrance.
